infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
**DEGRADED** — 1 task (`[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 walk-forward) not producing data after ~9h48m. All 10 collectors and broker healthy. Extended hours ended ~22:00Z — last bars captured at 21:45Z. No live trading impact (portfolio empty).

## Collectors
| ID | Type | Symbol | TF | Disabled | Data Fresh | Last Data | Price | Priority | Notes |
|----|------|--------|----|----------|------------|-----------|-------|----------|-------|
| `[[collector/e5125995]]` | alpaca | GLD | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $477.10 | Critical | Extended hours captured. 21 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/c00fd831]]` | alpaca | AAPL | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $260.97 | Important | Extended hours captured. 19 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` | alpaca | XLE | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $55.61 | Important | Extended hours captured. 21 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/ab739989]]` | alpaca | ESTC | 5min | No | ✅ 20:00Z | $51.85 | Important | Normal — ESTC ext hrs end ~20:00Z. 25 bars 18:00-20:00Z. |
| `[[collector/35cf414b]]` | alpaca | ESTC | 15min | No | ✅ 20:00Z | $51.85 | Important | Normal — ESTC ext hrs end ~20:00Z. 9 bars 18:00-20:00Z. |
| `[[collector/999b208d]]` | alpaca | SPY | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $678.08 | Low | Extended hours captured. 22 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/9c417caa]]` | alpaca | QQQ | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $608.64 | Low | Extended hours captured. 22 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/3d04a943]]` | alpaca | NVDA | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $184.85 | Low | Extended hours captured. 22 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/f60d4dce]]` | alpaca | IWM | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $253.39 | Low | Extended hours captured. 19 bars in last 2h. |
| `[[collector/2a8681ef]]` | alpaca | SLV | 5min | No | ✅ 21:45Z | $80.01 | Low | Extended hours captured. 22 bars in last 2h. |

## Brokers
| ID | Name | Type | Status | Notes |
|----|------|------|--------|-------|
| `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) | Alpaca Paper | alpaca | ✅ Healthy | paper-api.alpaca.markets, SIP data feed. Linked to `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` via PB 81234300. |

## Active Tasks (12 enabled, 11 producing, 1 dead)
| Task | EXP | Asset | Selection | best_fitness | Pop | Errors | Status |
|------|-----|-------|-----------|-------------|-----|--------|--------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` | Track A | GLD | spea2-rp | 0.6341 | 200 | 0 | **Reverted** from 0.8514→0.6341 at ~21:40Z. 12th confirmed 0.80+ transient. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` | Track B | GLD | spea2-rp | **0.8288** | 140 | 0 | Active surge. Pop building. Brief reversion to 0.4865 at 20:40Z, back to 0.8288. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` | Track C | GLD | nsga3 | — (between windows) | — | 0 | Last known 0.3835. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` | — | ESTC | spea2-rp | 0.6555 | 200 | 0 | Stable after reversion from 0.8382. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` | — | ESTC | nsga3 | 0.2288 | 200 | 0 | Slight recovery from 0.2077. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` | — | XLE | nsga3 | 0.2408 | 200 | 0 | Flat. Longest low period. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` | EXP-20 | GLD | nsga3 | 0.3063 | 300 | 0 | Stable. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` | EXP-17 | GLD | spea2-rp | **0.5482** | 200 | 0 | Uptick from 0.4604. Healthy. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` | EXP-22 | GLD | nsga3 | 0.4335 | 200 | 0 | Down from 0.5510 (normal cycling). |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` | EXP-21 | GLD | nsga3 | 0.4429 | 200 | 0 | Stable. |
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` | EXP-19 | AAPL | nsga3 | — (between windows) | — | 0 | Last known 0.2551. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` | EXP-18 | GLD | nsga3 (walk-forward) | ❌ null | null | 0 | **DEAD** — no data since creation (~9h48m). All metrics null. |

## Active Issues
| Component | Issue | Since | Impact | Action Taken |
|-----------|-------|-------|--------|--------------|
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` (EXP-18) | No metrics data — walk-forward task never started producing. All metrics (fitness, population, errors) null. | 12:14Z (~9h48m) | Low (GLD has 8 other active tasks) | Escalated to `[[agent/strategist]]` at 15:02Z. Messages still unprocessed (~7h, Strategist is daily-scheduled). |

## Resolved Issues (last 7 days)
| Component | Issue | Duration | Resolution |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------|
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (Track A) | Fitness surge to 0.8514 | 21:25Z–21:40Z (~15min) | Reverted to 0.6341. 12th confirmed 0.80+ transient. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17) | No metrics data | 12:14Z–~15:00Z (~2h47m) | Self-resolved. Pop now full at 200. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (ESTC) | Fitness surge to 0.8382 | 21:00Z–21:33Z (~33min) | Reverted to 0.6555 as expected. Normal cycling. |
| `[[collector/9c3ba4ef]]` (XLE) | Pre-market gaps | ~50min Tue | Resolved — continuous from ~10:55Z. |
| Eval scheduler (GitHub #95) | Reported as stopped since Mar 7 02:15Z | Mar 7–9 (~2 days) | Not broken. Weekend gap expected. Closed. |
| ESTC collectors | Fri pre-market data late | ~2h40m Fri 2026-03-07 | First bar at 11:40Z. Normal. |
| ESTC collectors | No pre-market data — 4h gap | ~4h Wed 2026-03-04 | Self-recovered at 13:00Z. |

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## 🔥 HEADLINE: Track B ONE EVAL AWAY from First-Ever Promotion

`[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]` achieved **4/5 consecutive evals ≥0.80** (0.833→0.827→0.806→0.806). Decline arrested — score stabilized for 2 consecutive evals. **Eval 5 (~Mar 11 02:15Z) is the make-or-break moment.**

⚠️ **Front-loading warning:** 0 closed trades in recent 30 days. Score sustained entirely by older trades.

## Evaluation System Status: ✅ RESTORED

Eval gap (Mar 8-9) was expected behavior — equity assets don't generate weekend data. Evals resumed normally with Mar 10 02:16Z batch. Multi-horizon evaluations now live (7 horizons per model).

## Promotion Pipeline

### Track B — ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80 — `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 GLD

| Model | Eval Trajectory | Latest 16w | OOS (expanding) | IS DD | OOS DD | Ops | WR | cecpp | Risk |
|-------|----------------|------------|-----------------|-------|--------|-----|-----|-------|------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | 0.833→0.827→0.806→**0.806** | **0.806** | **0.817** | **10.28%** (4.72% headroom) ✅ | 13.26% | 57 | 95.7% | 0.907 | Ops below 60-cliff. 2 losers. 0 recent closed trades. |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | 0.833→0.827→0.806→**0.806** | **0.806** | — | **10.28%** ✅ | 13.26% | 57 | 95.7% | 0.910 | Twin of 61694274. |

**Multi-horizon validation:** OOS expanding=0.817 (strong), 16w=0.806, 4w=0.034 (noise — few ops), 1w=0.028 (noise). Framework: short declining + long stable = **noise, not degradation** ✅.

**Key risk:** Score has stabilized at 0.806 (above 0.80 by only 0.006). Ops dropped to 57 (below 60-op trade_count_factor cliff). **If ops drop to 56 or any loser appears, score may dip below 0.80 and reset the consecutive count.** Recent 30d: 5 ops, 0 closed, $0 profit — pure front-loading.

**Verdict:** If eval 5 holds ≥0.80, recommend promotion despite front-loading concern. The model has genuine IS quality (IS score 0.786, IS DD 10.28%) and the OOS expanding score (0.817) confirms robustness. Front-loading is a GLD structural pattern, not a model deficiency.

### Track C — 2/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80 — `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 NSGA-III GLD

| Model | Eval Trajectory | Latest 16w | OOS BT | IS DD | OOS DD | IS-OOS Gap | cecpp | Ops | Status |
|-------|----------------|------------|--------|-------|--------|------------|-------|-----|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` ⭐ | 0.819→**0.817** | **0.817** | **0.817** | **13.38%** (1.62% headroom) ✅ | 9.44% | **1.2%** | 0.903 | 44 | BEST quality. Minimal inflation correction. |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | 0.818→**0.815** | **0.815** | — | **13.38%** ✅ | 9.44% | **1.2%** | 0.905 | 43 | Twin. Equally strong. |

**First-eval inflation test PASSED.** 198d0c1f: 0.819→0.817 (−0.2%). 289705b1: 0.818→0.815 (−0.4%). The typical GLD first-eval drop is 4-12%. These models showed <0.5% — confirming NSGA-III produces genuinely robust models with unprecedented stability.

**Front-loading confirmed:** Recent 30d: 6 ops, 0 closed, $0 profit for 198d0c1f. Same GLD structural pattern. BT OOS score stable at 0.817.

**Verdict:** Strongest candidates by quality metrics (1.2% IS-OOS gap, 9.44% OOS DD). Need 3 more consecutive evals ≥0.80. Earliest promotion ~Mar 14.

### Rising — 54b33aea — 2/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80 (ACTIVE TRADER)

| Model | Eval Trajectory | Latest 16w | OOS BT | IS DD | OOS DD | Recent 30d | Status |
|-------|----------------|------------|--------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` | 0.811→**0.832** ⬆️ | **0.832** | **0.832** | **13.38%** ✅ | 9.05% | 25 ops, 10W/6L, **$83** | ⚠️ Score UP +2.6% — rolling-window artifact (1 loser fell off). ACTIVELY TRADING. |

**Unique among top candidates:** The ONLY model with score ≥0.80 that has closed trades in the recent 30 days (10W/6L, $83 profit). 62.5% WR reverting toward IS WR (66.7%) — expected. IS-OOS gap 15.2% (higher than Track C's 1.2% — more regime-inflated).

**Score increase analysis:** Ops dropped 66→63, losers dropped 4→3 (rolling window shed 1 loser). This improved WR 0.875→0.944, which boosted the score. **This is a rolling-window artifact**, not genuine improvement. However, the underlying quality is real — BT 0.832, Sharpe 11.27, DD 9.05%.

**Verdict:** Promising due to active trading. IS-OOS gap (15.2%) is a concern. Task disabled but evals continue. 3 more evals needed for promotion.

### 4e87830e — 2/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80 (BORDERLINE IS DD)

| Model | Eval Trajectory | Latest 16w | IS DD | OOS DD | cecpp | Ops | Status |
|-------|----------------|------------|-------|--------|-------|-----|--------|
| `[[model/4e87830e]]` | 0.820→**0.808** | **0.808** | **14.83%** (0.17% headroom) ⚠️ | 9.44% | 0.947 | 44 | Declining. IS DD too tight. |

**Verdict:** Declining (-1.5%/eval). IS DD 14.83% has only 0.17% headroom — any IS DD increase blocks promotion. Not a viable promotion candidate. Classify as Monitoring.

### Track A — 7f7ac2e4 — 0/5 (RESET, BEST ACTIVE TRADER)

| Model | Eval Trajectory (last 5) | Latest 16w | OOS BT | IS DD | OOS DD | Recent 30d | Status |
|-------|-------------------------|------------|--------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | 0.782→0.738→0.805→0.798→**0.798** | **0.798** | **0.798** | **14.03%** (0.97% headroom) ⚠️ | **3.77%** ✅✅ | 9 ops, 7W/1L, **$149** ⭐ | Best active trader. Stalled below 0.80. |

**Verdict:** Best OOS DD (3.77%), highest cecpp (0.968), and only top model with strong recent trading ($149 profit, 87.5% WR). But volatile trajectory and stalled below 0.80. IS DD headroom (0.97%) is tight. Needs 5 consecutive from scratch — low probability.

## IS DD-Blocked (Score ≥0.80 but IS DD ≥15%)

| Model | Task | Latest 16w | Evals ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Block Margin | Trend |
|-------|------|-----------|-------------|-------|--------|-------------|-------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | **0.856** (RECORD) | 3/3 | **18.35%** | 4.04% | 3.35% over | Rock-solid. 100% WR. cecpp 0.973. |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | **0.784** ↓↓ | 1 | **19.20%** | 9.44% | 4.20% over | DROPPED -5.4%! Ops fell 40→38 (window rotation). |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | **0.801** | 3/4 | **19.27%** | 9.44% | 4.27% over | Stable at 0.801. Task disabled. |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | 0.773 | 0 | **15.25%** | 13.42% | 0.25% over | Declining. IS DD barely over limit. |

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | Score | IS DD | OOS DD | Ops | Evals (16w) | Trend | Next Review |
|-------|------|-------|-------|--------|-----|-------------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/50b0d769]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.763 | **10.28%** | 13.03% | 55 | 4 | Flat (0.763) | WR dropped (0.978→0.933). Below threshold. |
| `[[model/48b5cd64]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | 0.752 ↑ | **9.76%** | 13.25% | 42 | 5 | Recovering (+1.5%) | Task disabled. Best IS DD of any EXP-14 model. |
| `[[model/923a4e31]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.693 | **9.64%** | **8.40%** | — | 7 | Volatile | Best cross-regime safety. |
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.625 ↓ | **9.29%** | 13.36% | 85 | 3 | Declining (0.664→0.625) | Best IS DD headroom but score dropping. |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | 0.533 ↑ | 12.83% | — | 80 | 4 | Rising (+0.003/eval) | Best NSGA-III ESTC. Slow but steady. |

## XLE Pipeline — `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 (NEW INSTRUMENT)

| Model | Score (16w) | Score (OOS) | IS DD | OOS DD | cecpp (OOS) | Ops (OOS) | WR | Status |
|-------|------------|-------------|-------|--------|-------------|-----------|-----|--------|
| `[[model/6870f1e7]]` 🆕 | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | **NEW Mar 10.** IS BT: negative Sharpe, negative cecpp. Wait for OOS eval. |
| `[[model/14064f48]]` | **0.383** | **0.398** | — | **4.36%** ✅ | **0.951** | 34 | 78.6% | Excellent underlying quality. Score limited by trade_count_factor. |
| `[[model/4376d5b3]]` | 0.274 ↓ | — | — | — | — | — | — | Declining. |
| `[[model/b6332f55]]` | 0.192 | — | — | — | — | — | — | Very early. |
| `[[model/54afae21]]` | 0.161 | — | — | — | — | — | — | Very early. |

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | Score | Prev | Trend | Key Concern | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-------|------|-------|-------------|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | **0.784** | 0.829 | ↓↓ -5.4% | Ops 40→38. Window shedding trades. | No | IS DD blocks regardless. |
| `[[model/66806842]]` | `[[task/c6edbe72]]` EXP-5 | 0.592 | 0.607 | ↓ | Ops 142→135. Task DISABLED. | No | DYING. |
| `[[model/5c6aede0]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.709 | 0.709 | Flat | Stalled. cecpp declining. | No | DYING. |
| `[[model/6bd6b1c2]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.727 | 0.721 | Bouncing | OOS DD 16.18%. | No | DEAD. |

## Failed / Not Ready

| Category | Models | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| NSGA-III ESTC (low) | `[[model/f1df6a17]]` (0.316), `[[model/8b53300f]]` (0.244) | Stable but far from threshold. |
| EXP-10 GLD (failing) | `[[model/d314d811]]` (0.582), `[[model/5aedf294]]` (0.431), `[[model/73701688]]` (0.327) | Declining/dead. |
| SLV (DOA) | `[[model/7c530efd]]` (0.651), `[[model/ba5917fb]]` (0.250), `[[model/c19bd50b]]` (0.193) | Task disabled. |
| Baseline/misc | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (0.537), `[[model/31bff7f5]]` (0.546), `[[model/faba30c2]]` (0.415) | Reference. |

## Summary

- **Total models in system:** 73 (+2 since last report)
- **Above promotion threshold (≥0.80 on latest 16w):** 8
- **IS DD-eligible (≥0.80 AND IS DD <15%):** 6
- **On promotion track:** Track B: **4/5** ⭐⭐⭐⭐; Track C: 2/5; Rising: 2/5; Track A: 0/5
- **Newly promoted candidates:** 0 (imminent)
- **New models this cycle:** 2 (XLE)
- **Degrading models flagged:** 4 (none live)
- **Eval system:** ✅ Restored. Multi-horizon active.

## Promotion Timeline

| Scenario | Model(s) | Earliest | Probability | Dependency |
|----------|----------|----------|-------------|------------|
| **Track B holds** | 61694274/2704110c | **~Mar 11** | **50%** (↑ from 15%) | Eval 5 ≥0.80. Decline arrested at 0.806. |
| Track C sustained | 198d0c1f/289705b1 | ~Mar 14 | **50%** (↑ from 40%) | First-eval test passed. Need 3 more. |
| 54b33aea sustained | 54b33aea | ~Mar 14 | **30%** | Artifact increase. 3 more evals needed. |
| Track A stabilises | 7f7ac2e4 | ~Mar 16+ | **10%** | 5 consecutive from scratch. |
| No promotion by Mar 16 | — | — | **15%** (↓ from 35%) | All tracks decline simultaneously. |

## Backtest Cache (Updated Mar 10 12:30Z)

### 61694274 (Track B — 4/5)

portfolio-status.body:
# Portfolio Status

## Portfolios
| Portfolio | Models (enabled/total) | Total Allocation | Broker |
|-----------|----------------------|------------------|--------|
| `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` (447e2d45) | 0/0 | 0% | `[[broker/alpaca-paper]]` (ed622468) |

## Active Models
| Portfolio | Model | Allocation | Enabled Since | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Orders (24h) | Status |
|-----------|-------|------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------|------------|--------------|--------|
| — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty. First promotion imminent (Track B at 4/5). |

## Promotion Pipeline (Updated Mar 10 — Data Through Mar 10 02:16Z Eval)

### Track B — **4/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80** ⭐⭐⭐⭐ ONE EVAL AWAY
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Trend | Risk |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|-------|------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.833→0.827→0.806→**0.806** | **4/5** ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | 10.28% (4.72% headroom) ✅ | 13.26% | Stalled (decline arrested) | 57 ops (below 60-cliff) |
| `[[model/2704110c]]` | `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10 GLD) | 0.833→0.827→0.806→**0.806** | **4/5** ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | 10.28% (4.72% headroom) ✅ | 13.26% | Stalled | Twin of 61694274 |

**Multi-horizon validation**: 16w=0.8058 (stable), 4w=0.034 (GLD swing noise), 1w=0.028 (noise). Framework: short declining + long stable = **noise, not degradation**. Confirmed safe.

### Track C — **2/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80** — Best Quality
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | IS-OOS Gap | Status |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | 0.819→**0.817** | **2/5** | 13.38% ✅ | 9.44% | **1.2%** | Minimal inflation (-0.3%). Best candidate quality. |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | 0.818→**0.815** | **2/5** | 13.38% ✅ | 9.44% | **1.2%** | Twin of 198d0c1f. |

### Rising — `[[model/54b33aea]]` — 2/5 consecutive, Active Trader
| Model | Task | Eval Trajectory | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | IS-OOS Gap | Status |
|-------|------|----------------|-------------------|-------|--------|------------|--------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15 GLD nsga3) | 0.811→**0.832** ⬆️ | **2/5** | 13.38% ✅ | 9.05% | 15.2% | Anomalous increase. Active trader (9W/6L, $77). WR reverting. |

### Track A — RESET (0/5 consecutive)
| Model | Task | Score | Consecutive ≥0.80 | IS DD | OOS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-------|-------------------|-------|--------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11 GLD) | 0.798 | **0/5** (reset) | 14.03% ⚠️ | 3.77% ✅✅ | Only actively trading model (7W/1L, $149/30d). |

### IS DD-Blocked (Score ≥0.80 but permanently disqualified)
| Model | Score | IS DD | Block Margin |
|-------|-------|-------|-------------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | 0.856 (record) | 18.35% | 3.35% over |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | 0.829→0.784 ↓ | 19.20% | 4.20% over |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | 0.801 ↓ | 19.27% | 4.27% over |
| `[[model/19c1f02b]]` | 0.793 ↓ | 19.36% | 4.36% over |
| `[[model/0eca618b]]` | 0.773 ↓ | 15.25% | 0.25% over |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-10 | — | — | **HOLD** (no actions) | Track B at 4/5 consecutive — one eval away. Pre-promotion readiness verified. |
| 2026-03-09 | — | — | HOLD | Track B at 3/5, declining. EXP-15 models first eval only. |
| 2026-03-06 | — | `[[model/33e3f843]]` | **Formal demotion** | 4 consecutive below 0.65. Task disabled. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100% (portfolio empty)
- Portfolio-broker link: 81234300 verified and ready
- Models pending promotion: 0 (closest: `[[model/61694274]]` at **4/5** consecutive — one eval away)
- Estimated earliest promotion: **~Mar 11** (if Track B eval 5 ≥0.80)

## Key Risks
1. **GLD concentration**: ALL top candidates are GLD. No ESTC or XLE model near promotion.
2. **60-op cliff**: 61694274/2704110c at 57 ops (below 60-op threshold). If ops drop further, scores may crater.
3. **Track A IS DD**: 7f7ac2e4 has only 0.97% IS DD headroom.
4. **XLE early stage**: 3 models at 0.177-0.293. First diversification path but far from promotion.

## Next Critical Event
**Tue Mar 11 ~02:15Z**: Eval 5 for `[[model/61694274]]`/`[[model/2704110c]]`. If score ≥0.80: **5/5 consecutive → FIRST-EVER PROMOTION to `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` at 5% allocation.**

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Avg Sharpe | Avg MaxDD | Avg Ops | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|------------|-----------|---------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III GLD) | graph | ~0.81 | ~10.9 | ~13.4% | ~350 | `[[model/6e5c665f]]` (**0.829**) | 7 (4 above 0.80) | ⭐⭐⭐ **BEST TASK.** 4 models above 0.80. IS DD 13.38% promotable. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned) | graph | ~0.76 | ~11.9 | ~4.0% | ~54 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.856** RECORD) | 4 (3 viable) | Record score. Pop RECOVERED 200/200 (was 136). |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD baseline) | graph | ~0.69 | ~8.7 | ~12.3% | ~55 | `[[model/61694274]]` (**0.806**) | 9 (3 viable) | ⭐⭐ **SAFEST IS DD (10.28%).** 3/5 evals ≥0.80, declining. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` (EXP-16: XLE NSGA-III) | graph | ~0.30 | — | — | — | `[[model/6870f1e7]]` (**0.472** 🆕) | 5 (0 viable yet) | ⭐ **ACCELERATING.** Best score jumped 0.293→0.472 in 1 day. |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: ESTC NSGA-III) | graph | ~0.31 | — | — | ~79 | `[[model/64a144a1]]` (0.533) | 8 (1 viable) | Slow but rising (0.504→0.533). Pop 200/200. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC) | graph | ~0.33 | ~4.0 | ~10.5% | ~100 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. Pop 200/200. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/c6edbe72]]` (EXP-5) | graph | ~0.40 | Collapsed to 0.407 | 2 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 9 |
| `[[task/1d615d47]]` (EXP-14) | graph | ~0.78 | 3/5 models IS DD ≥19% | 5 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 9 |
| `[[task/1c326293]]` (EXP-9) | graph | ~0.46 | Pop death spiral | 2 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 6 |
| `[[task/79109412]]` (EXP-12) | graph | ~0.38 | SLV DOA | 3 | ❌ DISABLED Mar 4 |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | Control | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Stable. Pop 200/200. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | GLD viable long-short | 2026-02-27 | ⭐⭐ 61694274 at 3/5 evals ≥0.80. IS DD 10.28%. Declining trend. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | Tuned scorer removes GLD frequency penalty | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ Record 4fc2c04e (0.856). **Pop recovered 200/200.** |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | NSGA-III diversity on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 slowly rising (0.533). |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | NSGA-III finds low-IS-DD GLD models | 2026-03-06 | ⭐⭐⭐ **BREAKTHROUGH.** 4 models above 0.80! |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | XLE energy sector diversification | 2026-03-09 | ⭐ **ACCELERATING.** 5 models, best 0.472. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 🆕 | Improved features on safest-IS-DD config | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 🆕 | Walk-forward optimizer for regime-robust models | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` EXP-19 🆕 | AAPL tech sector diversification | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 🆕 | Larger pop (300) + 75 gens for deeper search | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 🆕 | DD-weighted scorer reduces GLD IS DD | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 🆕 | Subgraph crossover finds novel topologies | **2026-03-10** | 🆕 Just created. |

## Task Optimization Health

| Task | Best Fitness | Pop Size | Errors | Health |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|--------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.236 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Excellent |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | 0.532 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Healthy |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | 0.684 | **200/200** ✅ recovered | 0 | ✅ Recovered |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | 0.244 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Low fitness |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | 0.587 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Stable |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | 0.449 | **200/200** | 0 | ✅ Accelerating |
| New tasks (EXP-17–22) | — | — | — | 🆕 Just created |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. 🚀 6 New Experiments Created — 12 Total Active
Per human directive to increase research velocity and be creative. Testing 6 new dimensions: improved features on safe config, walk-forward optimizer, AAPL instrument, larger population, DD-weighted scorer, subgraph crossover evolver.

### 2. EXP-11 Population Recovered to 200/200
`[[task/a72da2ed]]` pop recovered from 136. Breeding caught up with graph_end_of_life expiry.

### 3. EXP-16 XLE Accelerating
5 models, best `[[model/6870f1e7]]` at 0.472 (was 0.293). On track for meaningful scores within days.

### 4. Multi-Horizon Evaluations Deployed
7 evaluation horizons now available for better degradation detection.

## Infrastructure
- **12 active tasks** (6 existing + 6 new) + 11 disabled
- **60 workers projected** (12 × 5)
- **4 instruments:** ESTC, GLD, XLE, AAPL 🆕
